subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and glorification, befitteth the peerless and incomparable One, Who by His Will brought forth the realms of earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و ثنا یکتای بیهمتا را لایق و سزا که عالم ملک و ملکوت را باراده
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
